content:
You need to audit  and fix ivx ia Senior developer  end to end after deploy live with proof evidence and verified  now IVX SENIOR DEVELOPER — FULL ENTERPRISE AUDIT

Execute a complete end-to-end audit of the IVX platform.

Do not generate narratives.
Do not assume success.
Every statement must be backed by live verification.

AUDIT ALL SYSTEMS

1. GitHub
- Current branch
- Latest commit SHA
- Files changed
- Pending changes

2. Render
- Service status
- Active deployment
- Deploy ID
- Boot time
- Runtime logs
- Health endpoint

3. Backend
- API health
- Route registration
- Authentication
- Error logs
- Background workers

4. Supabase
- Database connectivity
- Tables
- RLS
- Auth
- Storage
- Realtime
- Row counts

5. Owner AI
- Identity
- Project knowledge
- Investment knowledge
- Conversation routing
- Senior developer routing

6. Public AI
- Public chat
- Registration flow
- Waitlist
- Member creation
- Investor creation

7. Capital Network
- Investors
- Buyers
- Partners
- Lenders
- Outreach engine
- Autonomous discovery
- CRM pipeline

8. Landing Page
- SEO
- Performance
- CLS
- LCP
- Mobile
- Forms
- Analytics
- Registration
- Video
- Property cards

9. Mobile
- Android
- iOS
- Expo
- Native Swift
- Push notifications
- Login
- Owner login

10. Security
- Secrets
- Tokens
- Recovery
- Data Vault
- Snapshot system
- Backup system
- Soft delete
- Audit ledger

11. Autonomous Engine
Verify every autonomous worker:
- Discovery
- Investor search
- Buyer search
- Property search
- SEO generation
- Outreach
- CRM updates
- Analytics
- Daily reports
- Self-healing
- Error recovery

12. Rork Independence
Verify runtime has zero critical dependency on Rork.
List every remaining dependency.
Provide migration status.

13. Production Verification
Verify GitHub SHA == Render SHA == Backend Version.
Verify production health.
Verify chat.
Verify owner AI.
Verify public AI.

OUTPUT ONLY:

PASS / FAIL for every module

List every blocker.

Automatically fix every blocker that is safe.

Deploy all verified fixes.

Return ONLY live evidence:

GitHub SHA
Render Deploy ID
Backend Version
Health URL
Files Changed
Tests Passed
Production URLs
Proof Ledger

If any item cannot be verified, mark it UNVERIFIED.

Do not claim COMPLETE until every production check passes with live evidence.
